name: Santhosh Thiruchendru
role: Raleigh, NC · 20 years across automotive embedded systems, ADAS, and enterprise data platforms
summary: Product and program leader with 20 years spanning embedded automotive systems, ADAS platform strategy, and enterprise data and AI platforms — starting in C and Simulink at Caterpillar, leading Harman's pivot off an unproven lidar bet into a funded Edge-AI platform, then owning $7.9M and $1M+ revenue-impact platforms at Xperi. Strongest at taking ambiguous 0-to-1 mandates to production: ADAS architecture, ML metadata pipelines, and Salesforce revenue systems all started as a blank roadmap. Currently running Straventis Advisory Group, where a governance rebuild turned an at-risk program into a $3M contract.

roles.title: Founder & Principal Consultant — Particleblack / Ascension DFD
bullets: Founded Straventis Advisory Group and took on program leadership for a 4-vendor Digital Front Door initiative serving 140K associates.
Restored an at-risk program to a 6-week delivery cadence, hitting 95% on-time content delivery.
Built a 4-layer governance operating model that extended the engagement into a $3M contract.

roles.title: Founder & Principal Consultant — ContentIQ
bullets: Built a content analytics pipeline from scratch, with defensive parsing that automatically handles multiple export formats after the source platform changed without warning.
Shipped a working dashboard, not a mockup: KPI cards, engagement by category, account-wide timeline, and per-post growth pages with date-range filtering.
Took it from private tool to public product: landing page, About/roadmap, working signup flow, and a deliberate real-vs-relative metrics tradeoff for public data.

roles.title: Senior Technical Product Manager — Xperi LumApps DFD
bullets: Deployed LumApps as Xperi's Digital Front Door, replacing a fragmented legacy SharePoint intranet with one centralized entry point for all employees.
Integrated existing systems into a single dashboard rather than replacing them, preserving their ROI while unifying the employee experience.
Delivered the full build, integration, and handover in 6 months, then transitioned ownership and governance to the Marketing team.

roles.title: Senior Technical Product Manager — Salesforce Q2C & AWS Control Tower
bullets: Owned the Salesforce Global Certification Hub, recovering ~$1M/year in revenue leakage and hitting 92% first-time-right SDK delivery.
Led AWS Control Tower implementation, governing ~90 AWS accounts with automated, Terraform-based provisioning.
Cut Q2C workflow errors 70% and processing time 50% through CPQ/Billing automation and an anonymized lab routing engine.

roles.title: Senior Technical Program/Product Manager — Enterprise Data Platform (OnePipeline)
bullets: Owned OnePipeline, replacing a monolithic metadata pipeline with an ML-driven platform processing 240M records/month for TiVo's search, recommendations, and ad products.
Delivered ~$7.9M modeled net benefit and ~$11M legacy cost avoidance, cutting processing time from 25+ hours to ~30 minutes.
Rescued a stalled VOD migration and decoupled the Ad Platform launch, protecting a projected $500K in at-risk revenue.

roles.title: Platform Product Manager — AI Perception on Edge Compute
bullets: Pivoted Harman's ADAS roadmap away from a $1,000+ lidar investment to a camera-first Edge-AI platform, securing $3.2M in internal funding.
Proved a camera-only fallback variant, securing $700–900/vehicle BOM savings and hedging lidar supply chain risk.
Launched the first committed L2+ production line, driving 2–2.5x revenue uplift through multi-line vehicle reuse.

roles.title: Customer Technical Program Manager → Platform Product Manager — Project Argus
bullets: Closed out the Ford infotainment program cleanly while launching early lidar/computer vision proof-of-concept work for Harman's new ADAS effort.
Defined a scalable L2+ to L4 autonomous driving architecture on TI Jacinto processors, targeting ≥70% software reuse across autonomy tiers.
Architected object-level sensor fusion and HD map localization to unlock highway-pilot-class features.

roles.title: Customer Technical Program Manager — Ford Global Infotainment Program
bullets: Led Ford's $36M global infotainment program across 3 international factories, delivering 100% on-time launch and $224M+ in lifetime sales.
Managed a major mid-program scope realignment (US/Mexico to EU/APAC) and a USB-A to USB-C spec change without missing launch commitments.
Cut BOM cost 22% through VA/VE while holding compliance and OEM warranty commitments.

roles.title: Senior Engineer → Engineering Program Manager — CAT 785C DGB — Large Mining Truck Program
bullets: Built automated HIL validation frameworks for embedded engine controls, cutting manual testing effort ~40%.
Led a 5-person embedded validation team and served as Scrum Master, bringing Agile cadence to engine control software delivery.
Drove cross-functional integration and root-cause investigation across systems, controls, and calibration engineering.

roles.title: Senior Engineer — Engine Platform Controls System Optimization
bullets: Shifted into Technical Program Management, synchronizing hardware, software, and test teams on a major engine controls launch.
Built telemetry and data logging infrastructure for field-deployed fleets, cutting root-cause analysis time ~40%.
Built automated simulation environments to validate control algorithms ahead of hardware availability.

roles.title: Application Engineer — Honda-Yazaki Instrument Cluster Integration
bullets: Built systems integration and HIL testing foundation for automotive instrument cluster electronics, cutting integration failures through early validation.
Developed embedded firmware and control logic, establishing deterministic execution patterns for safety-critical functions.
Migrated legacy control software onto a standardized platform, cutting development cycle times for later product lines.

education: Six Sigma DMAIC/DMEDI Black Belt — Caterpillar era
